task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the specification document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, terminal, or file viewer displaying the contents of 'concorde_wing_spec.txt' from the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Verify a new Wing component named 'Concorde_Wing' was created in OpenVSP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenVSP Geometry Browser or main window showing a component of type Wing that has been explicitly renamed to 'Concorde_Wing'.

task_completion.description: Verify the planform parameters (Span, Root Chord, Tip Chord, Sweep) are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenVSP component geometry window with the 'Plan' tab selected. The values should be: Span = 25.6, Root_Chord = 34.0, Tip_Chord = 2.0, and Sweep = 60.0.

task_completion.description: Verify the cross-section (XSec) parameters are set to Biconvex with a 0.03 T/C ratio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenVSP component geometry window with the 'XSec' tab selected. The Airfoil Type drop-down should be set to 'Biconvex' and the T/C (Thickness-to-Chord) parameter should be 0.03. This must be done for the root and tip sections.

task_completion.description: Verify the completed model is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'concorde_wing.vsp3' being saved in '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/', or a terminal/file manager showing the file exists at that exact path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the OpenVSP graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the actual OpenVSP application window open and being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered parameters through the OpenVSP interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent typing or adjusting sliders/input boxes within the OpenVSP 'Plan' and 'XSec' tabs, rather than editing a .vsp3 XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent saved the file from within OpenVSP.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenVSP 'Accept' or 'Save' dialogs being used, ensuring the agent didn't just copy a pre-made file from another directory using terminal commands.
